token_budget_rules.description: Execute independent read/search operations in parallel
Use multi_replace_string_in_file instead of sequential edits
token_budget_rules.example: 10 file edits in 1 call vs 10 sequential calls

token_budget_rules.description: Use grep_search for exact matches instead of semantic_search
token_budget_rules.example: Finding 'class MyClass' vs semantic search for class definition

token_budget_rules.description: Read only needed lines, not entire files
Keep relevant context in memory for related operations
token_budget_rules.example: Multiple edits in same file context

cost_reduction_strategies.description: Answer multiple related questions in one conversation
cost_reduction_strategies.when_to_use: Multiple quick queries about same codebase

cost_reduction_strategies.description: Create detailed plan before starting work
Store search results for repeated queries
Use semantic search only for complex discovery
